assertions.title: Dashboard token metrics reflect streaming usage

steps.observed: Dashboard loaded after setting proxy auth token
Tokens / 24h card shows 0 with 'In 0 / Out 0' subtitle

steps.action: Check request log entries for non-zero tokens
steps.expected: If entries have tokens, metric should be non-zero
steps.observed: 12 request log entries present, all with 0 tokens. Metric correctly reflects 0 tokens.

steps.expected: Donut shows proportional data if tokens exist
steps.observed: Donut correctly shows 'No token activity yet' since all accounts have 0 tokens. Legend rows list all 4 accounts.

evidence.network: Dashboard API calls returned 200 after auth token was set

assertions.title: Legend swatches are visible with correct colors

steps.action: Locate legend swatches in Account Token Share section
steps.expected: Each swatch has background-color matching its donut segment color

steps.observed: All 4 swatches: width=12px, height=12px, display=block, borderRadius=999px

assertions.title: SVG donut segments still render correctly

steps.action: Verify adding background-color doesn't break SVG
steps.expected: SVG circles use stroke not background-color; fill: none prevents fill
steps.observed: CSS confirms fill: none still present. background-color has no effect on SVG circle elements. Donut arcs would render correctly via stroke property.

steps.action: Navigate to Provider Pool Status section
steps.expected: Provider card shows human-friendly auth label
steps.observed: openai provider card displays 'OAuth' pill label

steps.action: Verify label is not raw value

assertions.title: Account health rows show formatted auth types

steps.expected: Auth type subtitle shows human-friendly labels

steps.observed: Row 1: OAuth ✓, Row 2: OAuth ✓, Row 3: OAuth ✓, Row 4: OAuth ✓

assertions.title: All auth type values have human-friendly labels

steps.observed: AUTH_TYPE_LABELS maps: api_key→'API Key', oauth_bearer→'OAuth', local→'Local', none→'None', unknown→'Unknown'. Fallback capitalizes first letter.

steps.action: Search page text for raw snake_case auth type strings
steps.observed: Page text search: has_api_key=false, has_oauth_bearer=false. No raw snake_case auth strings found.

steps.action: Verify all dashboard auth type display points use formatAuthType
steps.expected: Provider pool pills and account health subtitles both use formatAuthType
steps.observed: DashboardPage.tsx line 297 (pool pill) and line 367 (health subtitle) both call formatAuthType()

usage_in_dashboard: line 297: formatAuthType(status.authType) in provider pool pill
line 367: formatAuthType(account.authType) in account health subtitle
codeInspection.fallback: Capitalizes first character for any unmapped value

frictions.description: Dashboard shows 'Unauthorized' error on first load — proxy auth token must be entered in the UI header field and saved before dashboard data loads. Not immediately obvious from user-testing.md guidance.
frictions.resolution: Filled the 'Proxy Token' field with the provided auth token and clicked Save, then reloaded the page.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all 6 passed. Token metrics correctly show 0 when no token data exists (455 requests with 0 tokens). Legend swatches render with correct background-color values matching the donut segment color scheme. SVG donut CSS correctly maintains fill:none while adding background-color for swatch use. Provider pool and account health sections show 'OAuth' instead of 'oauth_bearer'. Code inspection confirms all 5 auth types are mapped to human-friendly labels. No console errors detected.
